overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a Japanese temple village transitioning from afternoon sunlight to night, passing through gardens and encountering a villager near a curved roof temple.

traditional wooden building with thatched roof and stone foundation
low wooden fence lining the path with vertical posts
tree with red and orange autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a sunlit village path lined with wooden fences and autumn maple trees. A five-story pagoda stands prominently in the distance against a clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge and temple gate entrance

events.description: crossing wooden bridge over dry stream bed
passing through temple gate into darker courtyard, ambient light shifts to night

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden bridge and passing through wooden gate into temple grounds

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with railings crossing a dry stream
traditional wooden temple gate marking entrance to sacred grounds

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge and passes through a temple gate. The lighting transitions from afternoon sun to night as the pagoda disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: night garden with stone lanterns and pine trees

events.description: path illuminated by warm glow of stone lanterns in full night darkness

agents.ego_description: walking through moonlit garden path lined with glowing stone lanterns

tall pine tree silhouetted against night sky
temple building with distinctive curved wooden roof becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Now in full night, the character walks through a garden sheltered by trees. Stone lanterns provide warm illumination as a curved roof temple becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with curved roof building

events.description: character turns slightly to pass robed villager standing near temple

agents.ego_description: approaching temple building and passing a robed villager in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: villager in blue robes standing near temple entrance holding a basket

tall stone wall with wooden fence on top

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open temple courtyard where a curved roof building dominates the view. A robed villager stands near the entrance as the character passes by stone stairs and walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest path along stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking through deeply shaded forest area alongside stone wall

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees creating deep shadows over the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the temple behind, the character enters a deeply shaded forest path. Dense trees block the sky while the stone wall runs alongside the narrow trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a traditional Japanese village that transforms from a sunlit autumn afternoon into a deep, moonlit night. It begins with a samurai walking along a path lined with wooden fences and maple trees toward a distant five-story pagoda under a clear sky. As the character crosses a wooden bridge and passes through a temple gate, the daylight fades rapidly into night and the pagoda vanishes from view. The scene then shifts into a sheltered garden where warm stone lanterns illuminate the way toward a curved roof temple, leading the character into an open courtyard to pass a robed villager. Finally, the camera follows the samurai away from the temple architecture and into a deeply shaded forest path where dense trees block the sky.
